error.emailTaken: This email address is already in use.
error.loginTaken: This login name is already taken.
error.registrationDisabled: New account registration is currently unavailable.
error.unknown: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
error.emailTooLong: Email address must not exceed 64 characters.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.rateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please try again in an hour.

success.title: Account Created! — FairMT2
success.heading: Welcome to FairMT2!
success.message: Your account has been created. Download the patcher, run it, and start playing!
success.downloadNote: Run the patcher as administrator to download the game files.
